sections.one_line: Message handling entry point and phase pipeline for normalized turns
Shared per-turn state object that passes data between phases and defines their contract
Initial message handling to resolve instance and member IDs and create missing member state
Selects the active space and routing mode for each turn
Turn assembly of the prompt, scoped tools, memory, and pending messages
Principal agent reasoning and gated tool-use loop for producing the final response
Post-response delivery, relational message transitions, and consequence event emission
Persist the turn, emit events, update counters, and trigger compaction and harvest when needed
Per-space runner serialization and message merging to prevent race conditions in turn processing
How Kernos processes self-directed plan steps and evaluates them with the highest gate bar
Key code entry points for turn processing, phase routing, and per-turn state handling
